2258610.name: Monster Knockout Idle DLC
2258610.description:
Set against the backdrop of a vibrant and dynamic arena, players start by selecting their first monster from a diverse roster of quirky and lovable creatures. From fiery dragons to mischievous imps, each monster possesses unique abilities and traits that can be honed and enhanced through diligent training.

The gameplay revolves around a simple yet addictive mechanic: tapping. By tapping on the screen, players unleash their monster's attacks, earning coins with each successful hit. These coins serve as the currency for upgrading and unlocking new monsters, abilities, and features within the game.

As players progress, they'll encounter increasingly formidable opponents in the Monster Knockout arena. To emerge victorious, strategic thinking and careful planning are essential. Players must strategically allocate their resources, train their monsters diligently, and unlock powerful upgrades to overcome challenges

Monster Knockout Idle offers a delightful mix of engaging gameplay, charming visuals, and rewarding progression. Whether you're a casual player looking for a quick gaming fix or a dedicated strategist aiming for the top spot, this idle clicker game promises endless hours of monster-training fun and excitement. Are you ready to unleash the ultimate monster mayhem and claim your place as the reigning champion of the Monster Knockout Idle?
2258610.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
